videos.title: This Colorado Trail Leads to a Town That Shouldn't Exist
videos.description:
The mountains above Durango were named for silver that was never really there and this trail tells the whole story.

In this episode of Recon America, I point the Jeep up La Plata Canyon toward Kennebec Pass, an easy backcountry route that climbs past waterfalls, old mining claims, and the ruins of towns that boomed and busted 150 years ago. Most of the trail is a comfortable graded road, but the last stretch gets rocky you'll want 4WD and a little patience. At the top: the remains of the Cumber
